title: Escape to the Skies
lines: As you step onto the rug, it feels like stepping onto a cloud. The old man speaks a word you don't recognize, and the world below begins to tilt.
You rise above the palace, then the dunes. The entire desert stretches out beneath you, a shimmering void of violet and orange.
From this height, the zombies are nothing more than tiny, unmoving specks in the dust. You see a cluster of verdant mountains on the horizon.
You have escaped the hoard. You are free.
